summary: Iteration 34 testing completed successfully. All requested features verified: Backend prompts upgraded for full_detailed (6200+ words) and extensive_log (7800+ words) with mandatory markdown tables (comparative sentencing, common grounds, full options matrix) and explicit sentence reduction format (30/22.5 -> 18/11). Guardrails enforced (no cost discussion, no witness sections). Frontend ReportView renders premium design with top summary box, readiness gauge, TOC, and full markdown table rendering via react-markdown/remark-gfm. ReportsSection allows expanding reports inline with Full Report Page and Barrister View navigation buttons.

issues: Console warning about Collapsible changing from uncontrolled to controlled - minor React state warning
